alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing to benzene rings linked together by a C-C bond.
alternative_parents.name: Biphenyls and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a phenyltetrazole skeleton, which consists of a tetrazole bound to a phenyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenyltetrazoles and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Imidazoles in which the imidazole ring is substituted at for positions 1,2,4, and 5.
alternative_parents.name: 1,2,4,5-tetrasubstituted imidazoles

alternative_parents.description: Substituted imidazoles in which the imidazole ring bears a carbonyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonylimidazoles

alternative_parents.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing an imidazole ring substituted at position 1.
alternative_parents.name: N-substituted imidazoles

alternative_parents.description: Compounds comprising the carbonic acid diester functional group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonic acid diesters

alternative_parents.description: Compounds in which a hydroxy group, -OH, is attached to a saturated carbon atom R3COH (R not H ).
alternative_parents.name: Tertiary alcohols

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid derivatives in which the carbon atom from the carbonyl group is attached to an alkyl or an aryl moiety through an oxygen atom (forming an ester group).
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acids containing exactly one carboxyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Monocarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an alcohol group attached to an aromatic carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Aromatic alcohols

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing a triphenyl moiety.
class.name: Triphenyl compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as triphenyl compounds. These are aromatic compounds containing a triphenyl moiety.

direct_parent.description: Aromatic compounds containing a triphenyl moiety.
direct_parent.name: Triphenyl compounds

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

predicted_lipidmaps_terms: Diphenyl ethers, biphenyls, dibenzyls and stilbenes (PK1309)

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
